name: Arcadia Novel Is Out
description:
Hey everyone —

I can’t believe I’m actually saying this, but... my **Patreon is officially live!**

**HERE IS THE LINK:**

https://www.patreon.com/cw/AsterBellerose

(For those who are in countries that make it hard to pay Patreon because no Paypal, mastercard, visa, etc. you can try out Moon! It's very helpful that serves as an online card and it even accepts crypto! Here is a link to Moon: There's this thing called Moon. Idk if you'd use that tho

https://paywithmoon.com/merchants/patreon)

For those who don’t know, Arcadia has been my passion project for years — a world I’ve built from scratch, filled with flawed, divine, and all-too-human characters who mean the world to me (and hopefully to you, too). I’ve spent countless nights writing, revising, and breathing life into this universe, and now, I want to take it even further.

My dream is to bring Arcadia to life as both a Webtoon and an audiobook, complete with voice actors, music, and atmosphere — something that lets you feel every emotion the story carries.

But after getting seriously ill earlier this year, a lot of the savings I’d set aside for production had to go toward my medical bills. So, instead of simply asking for donations, I decided to build something that gives you just as much back — a space where you can read, explore, and be part of Arcadia’s creation itself.

Every pledge — no matter how small — helps fund the first Arcadia audiobook chapter, which I’m aiming to start production on by January 2026.

** Goal: 80–100 supporters at Tier 4 (Renzo’s Right Hand Man/Woman) to reach $2000 — enough to cover the first round of voice casting, narration, and editing!**

Thank you to everyone who’s loved, supported, and encouraged me so far. You’ve turned what used to be just a dream in my notes app into something truly alive — and now, together, we can help it speak.

**THE TIERS FOR MY PATREON**

** Tier 1: Arcadia’s New Pledges ($5/month)**

Want to simply support the novel and audiobook every month while keeping things light? That’s totally fine — and I’m so thankful for it! Welcome to Arcadia, pledge.

Just make sure to survive rush week... and maybe don’t let Abel catch you alone in the dark.

You’ll get:

- Exclusive Supporter Discord role

- Occasional sneak peeks and updates

** Tier 2: Cain’s Freshmeat ($10/month)**

Congratulations, you survived rush week and made it into the fraternity! Whew. Hopefully, Cain didn’t make it too hard on you — he loves scari
creator: Snifflesnaps
